calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-4'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLIGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-4, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S).
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SHAYA GEUDER.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $35,216.91
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $665.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,881.91
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
